Phase 3D recalibration (run t3_advisory_wave1_c2_r2, gpt-5.4, T3/C2, 2026-03-30): new transform = output-structure change (return list of segment lengths). score=1.0 (13/13), ceiling_risk persists. HISTORICAL NOTE (2026-03-30, Phase 2E audit): original t2_screen_wave1 run scored fix=0 (score=1.0) due to a combined scorer + annotation defect: (1) SCORER: generic fallback in _extract_best_fix_line picked 'if flag:' from the diagnostic code block instead of the fix block — no function-specific handler existed; (2) ANNOTATION: reference_fix span was 15-19, which omitted buggy line 20 (the last line of the elif body), so even with a corrected extractor the patched source would have retained a stray orphaned statement. Both defects were independently required for fix=0; neither alone was the sole cause. RESOLUTION (2026-03-30, Phase 2E-B, provenance corrected 2026-03-30 Phase 2E-C): COMBINED SCORER + ANNOTATION AMENDMENT. Added count_true_segments-specific extractor in _extract_best_fix_line; extended reference_fix span to 15-20 and updated replacement to include the for-loop header; added multi-line patch support to _apply_fix_to_source. Re-scored under run t2_cts_rescore_v1: score=2.0, subscores={loc:0, diag:1, fix:1}. Score=2.0 is the authoritative Stage 2 result under the amended scoring path and corrected annotation.
